title: Pleocaulus reticulatus
taxonomy: Pleocaulus reticulatus is a species of fern in the genus Pleocaulus, belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This classification places it within the larger group of leptosporangiate ferns. Pleocaulus reticulatus is further categorized under the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The family Polypodiaceae is a diverse group of ferns that includes over 2,000 species, with many more being discovered. These ferns are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
